versions.version_description: This version is the one you will find when George Ezra plays it acoustic. Capo at 2nd fret is just a personal preference for singing.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  My house in Budapest, my, my hidden treasure chest[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Golden grand piano, my beautiful castillo[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You, you, I'd leave it all[/tab]
            
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  My acres of a land, I have achieved[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  It may be hard for you to stop and believe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
But for you, you, I'd leave it all        [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, for you, you, I'd leave it all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Give me one good reason why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, if you hold me, then all of this will go away[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  My many artefacts, the list goes on[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  If you just say the words I, I'll up and run[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, to you, you, I'd leave it all[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, for you, you, I'd leave it all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Give me one good reason why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, if you hold me, then all of this will go away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Give me one good reason why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, if you hold me, then all of this will go away[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 

[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  My friends and family, they don't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  They fear they'd lose so much if you take my hand[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
But for you, you, I'd lose it all[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, for you, you, I'd lose it all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Give me one good reason why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, if you hold me, then all of this will go away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Give me one good reason why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, if you hold me, then all of this will go away[/tab]

[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  My house in Budapest my, my hidden treasure chest[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  Golden grand piano, my beautiful castillo[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You, you, I'd leave it all[/tab]
